   |  Entry  |
   +----+----+
        |
        v
+--------------+
|  Loop Start  |<-----+
+-------+------+      :
        |             :
        v             :
   +---------+        :
   |  Inner  |        :
   +----+----+        :
        |             :
        v             :
   +---------+        :
   |  Check  |--------+
   +----+----+
        |
        v
   +--------+
   |  Exit  |
   +--------+
